patient_summary:
• 73/F patient
• Primary Dx: Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus
• Key Procedures: Colonoscopy with biopsy
• Active Meds: 1 medication including Atorvastatin
• Critical Labs: Ferritin 266.8 (H); Iron 41 (L); eGFR 58 (L)
• Key History: Smoking Tobacco: Every Day Cigarettes 0.5 50
